programme.title: Forests
programme.desc: Forests - Deforestation and Desertification, Soil Erosion and Degradation, Ground Pollution, Sustainable Forest Management, Reforestation, National Parks

programme.title: Energy
programme.desc: Energy - Fossil Fuels and Dirty Energy Renewable and Clean Energy, Nuclear Energy, Energy Efficiency and Conservation, Alternative Fuel Vehicles

programme.title: ChangeMakers - Will Travers
programme.desc: Niall McCann talks to Will Travers, conservationist and co-founder of the Born Free Foundation.

programme.title: ChangeMakers - Joyce Poole
programme.desc: Niall McCann talks to elephant biologist Joyce Poole about her career studying elephant communication and a lifetime of research in east Africa.

programme.title: Climate Change - When Skies Ran Dry
programme.desc: Stories from farmers all over the world adaptating to climate change consequencies.

programme.title: ChangeMakers - Jenny Desmond
programme.desc: Niall McCann talks to Jenny Desmond - a conservationist and wildlife activist. Jenny & her husband Jimmy run a sanctuary for rescue Chimpanzees in Liberia, west Africa - they have dedicated their lives to the rehabilitation of humankind's closest relative.

programme.title: Water
programme.desc: Water - Scarcity, Safe Water and Sanitation, Water Pollution, Water related-hazards, Drinking water and wastewater treatment technologies

programme.title: Switch On The Series
programme.desc: Visit the Maasai savannah of Kenya, Africa's largest slum and its newest hydroelectric dam. Journey into the coal mines and power plants of growing Vietnam. Cross Nepal with an environmental health scientist, studying people's transition from the most dangerous cooking fuel, killing millions a year, to the safest. And bring solar electricity, for the first time ever, to the Arhuaco people of Northern Colombia. Watch this 7-part series, based on and expanded from the celebrated global energy documentary Switch On– a spectacular, unexpected journey to know and understand the issues driving energy development around the world.

programme.title: Alvelal, Una Historia Real
programme.desc: With optimism and determination, the voices of farmers and AlVelAl entrepreneurs show us practical and realistic solutions to combat desertification and the loss of life that affects so many rural areas around the world. It is the story of entrepreneurs for the environmental, economic and social regeneration of their territory, the Altiplano Estepario of Almeria, Granada and Murcia. More information at https://www.headheartandhands.site

programme.title: People on Earth
programme.desc: People on Earth - Overpopulation, Inequalities within and among countries, Poverty, Hunger, Health, Gender equality

programme.title: Detroit Hives
programme.desc: Detroit Hives follows Tim Paule and Nicole Lindsey, a young couple from East Detroit, who are working hard to bring diversity to the field of beekeeping and create opportunities for young Detroit natives to overcome adversity. It is estimated that Detroit has well over 90,000 empty housing lots to date. In an effort to address this issue, Tim and Nicole have been purchasing vacant lots and converting them into bee farms. Detroit Hives explores the importance of bringing diversity to beekeeping and rebuilding inner-city communities one hive at a time.

programme.title: Documentary Shows
programme.desc: GEM TV provides environmental documentaries, sustainability programs, and educational content on global ecological issues.
